name: Bug Flare (Stage 3)
description: The fully realized solar insectoid titan. Flying across star clusters, it leaves trails of stardust and blazing solar winds in its wake.
originLore: Reaching full maturity in the core of stellar superclusters, Bug Flare Stage 3 commands legions of solar flares with every flap of its majestic wings.

lore.celestialConcordance: Bug Flare Stage 3 leads the cosmic swarm to ignite dead worlds, jumpstarting ecological cycles with solar energy.

quantumResonators.name: Solar Tempest
quantumResonators.description: Unleashes a hurricane of flaming solar dust that vaporizes enemy projectiles.

quantumResonators.name: Chitin Supernova
quantumResonators.description: Detonates excess thermal armor, causing a localized supernova blast.
